chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-199 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 12.02.2026 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Lashari, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General, Sindh Alongwith SI Tariq Mehmood, P.S Chakiwara ---------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that missing person namely Abdul Moiz S/o Abdul Aziz has been surfaced, therefore, he does press instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
